meta.title: SpaceX Reveals New Starship Lunar Lander Plans!
meta.description:
SpaceX revealed new renders and plans for their upcoming HLS Starship lunar lander for the Artemis program. I thought we could go over the press release together with a fine tooth comb and talk about all the new things!

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

All music is original! Check it out anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) by searching Everyday Astronaut
